title: 检视客户投资组合 / Reviewing Portfolios
summary: 理财是持续过程:定期及重大变化时检视组合,核对目标/风险/市场,必要时再平衡并记录。 / Planning is ongoing: review portfolios periodically and on major changes, check goals/risk/markets, rebalance if needed and document.

sections.heading: 何时与检视什么
sections.body: 定期及客户重大变化(婚育、收入、健康、目标)或市场显著变动时;核对组合是否仍匹配目标与风险、保障是否仍足。

sections.heading: When & what
sections.body: Periodically and on major life/market changes; check whether the portfolio still fits goals/risk and whether cover is still adequate.

sections.heading: 再平衡与记录
sections.body: 必要时再平衡或调整;记录检视结论与调整建议,保持可追溯。

sections.heading: Rebalance & record
sections.body: Rebalance/adjust as needed; document findings and recommendations for traceability.

keyPoints: 定期+重大变化时检视 / Review periodically and on major changes
核对目标/风险/市场 / Check goals/risk/markets
记录检视结论 / Document findings
